The Vessel

Meet the Montauk

Built for serious fishing, the Montauk is a 42-foot custom-built Downeast-style boat built for inshore and offshore fishing. Comfortable, seaworthy, and fully equipped — she's at home in Montauk Harbor or running to the canyons 60 miles offshore.

Every trip is fully customizable — whether you're booking a private party or joining an open boat, we tailor the experience to you.

Our Trips

Choose your adventure

Half-day, full-day, or overnight — every trip is customizable. Book the whole boat as a private party or join an open boat trip. All tackle, bait, and ice included.

🎣
Half-Day Inshore
4 hours · up to 6 guests · perfect for families and first-timers
$900 / charter

$1,500 / charter

Montauk Point — "The End"

Where Long Island meets the Atlantic. The most storied fishing grounds on the East Coast — and our backyard for over 20 years.

Meet Your Captain

A Life Well Fished.

"I've been fishing these waters my whole life — Montauk is home. Every trip teaches me something new, and I bring everything I've learned to work for you."

As the owner and captain of Mission Fisheries, Captain Dan has fished the waters off Montauk Point his entire life — from the inshore reefs of Block Island Sound to the offshore canyons. I don't claim to know it all, but I show up every trip ready to put in the work to find fish.

Every charter is personal. I take pride in putting my clients on fish, whether it's a family's first striper or a seasoned angler chasing a canyon slam.

Contact Captain Dan

Whales Off Montauk

The waters off Montauk Point are alive with marine life. Come see it for yourself.

Witness the Wild

The waters off Montauk Point are alive — whales, dolphins, and incredible marine life right outside the harbor.

Target Species

What's biting off Montauk

Montauk Point sits at the convergence of the Atlantic and Long Island Sound — some of the richest fishing grounds on the entire East Coast.

🐟 Striped Bass
🐠 Bluefin Tuna
🐟 Fluke / Flounder
🐡 Bluefish
🌊 Albacore
🐟 Porgy / Sea Bass
🐟 Blackfish
🐠 Mahi-Mahi
⚡ Yellowfin Tuna
